title: viola lutea var. elegans
intro: Viola lutea var. elegans, also known as the yellow violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause and arthritis. Herbal preparations of Viola lutea var. elegans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
